title.en: Everyone in the Yun family was dumbfounded, the...

content.en:
Everyone in the Yun family was dumbfounded, they couldn't believe it!

Flame Sword Divine Lord, that's a cosmic god!

In the Disk Domain, the Cosmic God is a great existence that can open up a hegemon-level force, and it is almost invincible.

Compared to the cosmic gods, the galaxy level is like an ant facing a god, and Ye Tian is not even a galaxy level, he is just a galaxy-level powerhouse.

But now, Ye Tian easily defeated the Flame Sword Divine Lord with his galaxy-level cultivation, and even captured the Flame Sword Divine Lord.

For a moment, Allah and the others lowered their heads one by one, not daring to look at Ye Tian.

"The Yun family will continue to be sealed!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Next, everyone in the Yun family was driven back to Panyunxing by Ye Tian.

Then, Ye Tian personally arranged the seal and sealed Pan Yunxing again.

Then, Ye Tian waited in the void.

After about a few hours, Ye Tian estimated and said, "The people from the Divine Blade Alliance should be arriving soon!"

Sure enough, it didn't take long for the people from the Divine Blade Alliance to come!

Rushing!!!

In the void, a spaceship appeared.

Immediately, two cosmic gods flew down from the spaceship.

These two cosmic gods are not ordinary cosmic gods, their cultivation is the pinnacle of cosmic gods, and their combat power is also very strong, far from being comparable to the cosmic gods of the disk.

"I've seen the True Monarch of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"I've seen the True Monarch of Ten Thousand Laws!"

When these two cosmic gods saw Ye Tian, they said very politely.

Obviously, they knew Ye Tian and knew Ye Tian's identity, so they didn't dare to make a mistake.

"It turned out to be the Golden Hades God Lord and the Silver Hades God Lord of the Divine Blade Alliance!"

Ye Tian also said politely.

"Wanfa True Monarch, let's talk about the right thing, you said that you found Allah Yandao, I don't know where he is now?" asked the Golden Hades God Lord.

"Here!"

Ye Tian spread out his palm and released the Flame Sword Divine Master.

When the Golden Hades God Lord and the Silver Hades God Lord saw the dying Flame Sword God Lord, they were immediately alarmed.

"Yan Dao Allah, no, he has broken through to the realm of the cosmic gods!"

The Golden Hades Lord was surprised.

Immediately, he looked at Ye Tian in surprise.

The Flame Sword Divine Lord has become a cosmic god realm, and Ye Tiancai is galaxy-level!

But Ye Tian captured the Flame Sword Divine Lord alive, this is incredible.

"Isn't it ......"

The eyes of the Golden Hades and the Silver Hades looked at the void on the other side.

At this time, the undead army lord took the initiative to appear and said, "I have seen the Golden Hades God Lord and the Silver Hades God Lord, this matter has nothing to do with me, and I didn't make a move." It was the Ten Thousand Law True Monarch who was slightly injured and captured the Flame Sword Divine Master!"

At this moment, the Golden Hades Lord and the Silver Hades God Lord were completely stunned.

Only then did they really realize how terrifying Ye Tian's combat power was, just the galaxy-level cultivation had the combat power of the cosmic god, this was too terrifying, it was almost impossible for such a heaven-defying genius to appear in the past.

"I not only discovered the Golden Hades Divine Lord, the Silver Hades Divine Lord, and the Flame Sword Divine Lord, but also personally captured them, so I should be considered to have completed the task, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"Of course!"

The Golden Hades God Lord hurriedly said.

Immediately, the Golden Hades God Lord and the Silver Hades God Lord invited Ye Tian to return to the Divine Blade Alliance and hand over the task.

Ye Tian left with the Golden Hades God Lord and the Silver Hades God Lord.

The Immortal Army Lord looked at Ye Tian's departure and sighed deeply: "The strength of the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch is far from being able to comprehend it, those sons of the universe are simply ants compared to him, no wonder the Supreme Hall of the Human Race has such a high opinion of him! Maybe his real strength is not much weaker than mine, and he can even surpass me soon!"

That's a good thing, though.

He has at least established a good relationship with Ye Tian, and there is still hope for Ye Tian's support in the future.

As soon as he thought of this, he laughed happily.

......

Sanctuary.

Divine Blade Alliance, Tianlan Branch.

Since there is a teleportation stone gate directly to Tianlan Giant City in the area, it is most convenient to come to the Tianlan branch.

Immediately, with the assistance of the Golden Hades God Lord and the Silver Hades God Lord, Ye Tian successfully handed over the task, and also took back the Origin Knife Weapon and Chaos Rare Earth from the Yan Dao Allah.

Of course.

Ye Tian also received the rewards of three Sword Heavenly Dao texts, and because he personally captured Allah of the Yan Knife, he completed the additional task, and obtained the Star River Mission Order of the Divine Blade Alliance and 100,000 Divine Blade Points.

The Galaxy Mission Order allows Ye Tian to take over the tasks belonging to the Galaxy level, and the 100,000 Divine Blade points are also precious, and you can buy many treasures of the Divine Blade Alliance.

In short, Ye Tian made a lot of money this time.

After completing this task, Ye Tian continued to return to the Domain, because he still had some things to deal with.

"Sword Emperor Sect, the Divine Blade Alliance doesn't care about you, a weak force, and is too lazy to deal with you. But I can't let it go, if the Sword Feather Divine Lord chooses to take revenge on me, even if it can't hurt me, but if it hurts the earth and my relatives, this is absolutely not allowed. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He is ready to come to the Sword Emperor Sect in person to deal with the troubles!

......

Disk, the headquarters of the Sword Emperor Sect.

The Sword Feather Divine Lord sat on the throne, and his whole person trembled.

He had already received the news that his younger brother, the Flame Sword Divine Master, had been caught.

"Will the Divine Blade Alliance sanction me? If the Divine Blade Alliance gives an order, I will definitely die!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord thought to himself.

"The Divine Blade Alliance just wants to capture my younger brother, and I have not betrayed the Terrans, and the Divine Blade Alliance cannot represent the Terrans, so they have no right to sanction me, and they are too lazy to deal with me, right? "

Thinking like this, the Sword Feather Divine Lord felt a little relieved.

But he was still very afraid, for fear that the powerhouse of the Divine Blade Alliance would come.

Little by little, time passed.

this day.

A figure stepped into front of the Sword Emperor Sect, and the aura of killing filled the Sword Emperor Sect.

This person is Ye Tian!

"Let the Sword Feather Divine Lord come out!"

Ye Tian said in a deep voice.

"Who dares to trespass on the Sword Emperor Sect?"

A roar was heard.

Wow!

The Black Shadow Sword Lord of the Sword Emperor Sect appeared, his gaze looking directly at Ye Tian.

"Your Highness Wanfa, it's you!Hey, your cultivation speed is quite fast, and you have even reached the peak realm of the galaxy level!" the Black Shadow Sword Lord said in surprise.

"Black Shadow Sword Lord, let the Sword Feather Divine Lord come out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"If you want to see the Sword Feather Divine Lord, you are not qualified enough. I heard that the Supreme Hall of the Terran only cultivates His Highness the Great God level and below, and you are now at the galaxy level, and you must no longer be Your Highness of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race. Without the Terran Supreme Hall as a backer, even if I bully you, the Terran Supreme Hall will not be able to sanction me. Do you think you're still protected by the Terrans?"

The Black Shadow Sword is the main way.

"One more word, let the Sword Feather Divine Lord come out!"

Ye Tian said in a deep voice.

Whoa!!!

More and more disciples, deacons, and elders of the Sword Emperor Sect came out, and they watched the excitement one by one.

They weren't afraid, after all, how could a galaxy-level Sword Emperor Sect be?

"You're not qualified!"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord said coldly.

"If the Black Shadow Sword Lord commits a crime, he dares to be disrespectful to the envoy of the town domain, and he should be suppressed!"

Ye Tian's voice diffused.

The next moment.

A great chaotic hand descended and crushed towards the Black Shadow Sword Lord.

"Not good!"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord was shocked, and immediately stabbed with all his strength.

However, his attack power was simply different from Ye Tian's, the blade was shattered, and he had no power to resist and was slapped by Ye Tian to be seriously injured and dying, and even the small world in his body was shattered.

The Black Shadow Sword Master, it's useless!

"Wanfa Zhenjun, you have passed !!!"

The angry voice of the Sword Feather Divine Lord resounded through the Sword Emperor Sect.

The next moment, the Sword Feather Divine Lord descended and appeared in front of Ye Tian.
